front: Painting: Abstract memorial featuring military flags, iron cross, and initials 'K.v.F.' for his German lover killed in WWI
back: Portrait of a German Officer (Marsden Hartley)

front: Painting: Includes a helmet inscribed with numbers 8 and 9 representing lover Karl von Freyburg's regiment
back: Portrait of a German Officer (Marsden Hartley)

front: Artist: Nicknamed 'the painter of Maine'; painted many views of Mount Katahdin as a dark mass over a red landscape
work: Maine Paintings (Mount Katahdin, The Ice Hole, Lobster Fishermen)

front: Painting: Shows an 'A'-shaped opening carved in a frozen Maine lake surface at night
work: Maine Paintings (Mount Katahdin, The Ice Hole, Lobster Fishermen)

front: Painting: Stieglitz used this Hartley painting as the backdrop for his photograph of Duchamp's Fountain
